description: Style NoteSlim silhouette on this structured derby from arrow for men. The interesting cutouts referencing the classic Scottish brogue on this pair, refines your formal look. With slick suiting or toned-down shirt and trousers, these shoes crafted from Italian leather add a definite panache to your ensemble.Product DetailsTapering round-toed Derby shoes in brown with brogueing on the toe boxFive hole lace-ups with a soft footbedTPR outsole with a stacked heel and branded grooves on the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
